description: Speed the Signature Collection Campaign for the Unemployment Insurance Bill Unemployment Insurance Must Be Won Now Vol VII No 281 ALL OUT TODAY AT 530 P ft TO SMASH INJUNCTION Expose Them AT Geneva the imperialist powers are pretending to talk about peace measures The chairman of the Preparatory Disarmament Commis sion publicly begged that the word disarmament be not used in con nection with the commissions work The Soviet Unions delegation insisting in vain that its proposal of actual real and complete disarmament be adopted was even defeated on its partial demand that the purpose of the commission be not only to limit navies but to reduce them The proposal made by Litvinoff was emasculated by the action of France amending it by adding the words as far as possible With full justice did the Soviet delegate sarcastically propose that the commis sion rename itself the Commission to Secure Disarmamentif Possible Only the Soviet Union has shown honesty and real desire for peace And for that very reason the plot now being exposed by the imperialist powers including the fake Labor government of England to make war upon the Soviet Union and to conspire with counterrevolutionary elements within the
